name: v2.1.0
body:
## What's New

- Fixed tab navigation lag when jumping across multiple tabs
- Added album art rotation animation on play/pause
- Improved dark theme contrast for progress bars
- Fixed ForegroundService crash on Android 14+
- Swipe gestures now work on full album art area

## Bug Fixes

- Slider no longer fights with playback position updates
- Share/Favorite buttons now have visible borders
- Volume HUD replaced with inline bottom-bar display

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Playboy-gg/MediaVault/compare/v2.0.0...v2.1.0
